title: GDELT News Monitor — Global News Mentions to JSON
shortDescription: Search global news (GDELT, 100+ languages) by keyword and get article title, source, domain, country and date as JSON — $0.002 per article.
seoTitle: GDELT News Scraper — Global News & Brand Mention Search to JSON API
seoDescription: Global news scraper & API: search worldwide news by keyword (GDELT, 100+ languages) for source, country and date as JSON. For news-monitoring AI agents.

query.label: Keyword, brand, or topic
query.description: Term to search across worldwide online news, e.g. a company, product, person, or event. GDELT indexes news in 100+ languages.

readme.intro: GDELT monitors the world’s news media in real time across 100+ languages. This actor turns a keyword into the matching global news coverage, so brand-monitoring, PR, and market-intelligence agents can track what the world is publishing about any topic as structured data.
bullets: Search worldwide online news by keyword, brand, person, or event (100+ languages)
Each result: article title, publisher domain, source country, language, publication date, URL
Sorted newest-first; filter by postedAfter for an incremental mention feed
Batch many terms per run; cap spend with maxResults
Agent-ready: flat JSON with the article URL + scrapedAt for citation

faq.a: GDELT updates continuously; results are sorted newest-first so you see the latest coverage.
Yes — GDELT monitors news in 100+ languages worldwide, with the source country on each result.

faq.q: Can I monitor a brand over time?
faq.a: Yes — search the term and use postedAfter on a schedule to catch only new coverage.
